nameMeanings.name: Chudleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Chudley
meanings: English: locative name from Chudleigh in Devon.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Walter Chudleigh was born about 1026, in Higher Ashton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Walter Chudleigh. She died in her hometown.

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Walter Chudleigh(은)는 대략 1026년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 히거 애슈턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Walter Chudleigh(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.
